Home - The Bluebird Cafe
NEWS
Bluebird on 3rd 2026 Shows
Bluebird on 3rd is back! Join us at 3rd & Lindsley starting Monday, March 16, and every Monday at 12:30 p.m. for Nashville’s favorite lunchtime show.
Read More
The Bluebird Golden Pick Contest – Season 7
Enter your original song in our monthly Bluebird Golden Pick Contest for the chance to play at The Bluebird Cafe, win a GS mini Taylor guitar, and more!
Read More
Bluebird at the Symphony
The musicians of the Nashville Symphony join forces with The Bluebird Cafe to bring you Bluebird at the Symphony! In this artistic collaboration, celebrated songwriters will perform their familiar favorites reimagined with magnificent orchestrations performed live by the GRAMMY®-winning Nashville Symphony.
Read More

Purchase Policy
Fans, please beware of fraudulent Bluebird Cafe tickets. We have recently experienced fraudulent Bluebird Cafe tickets being sold through secondary ticketing sources such as StubHub and Viagogo. These sites use false seating maps and sell non-existent "ghost seats." The
only
place to purchase valid tickets is through our website, in conjunction with our ticketing partner TicketWeb. Tickets from other sources will not be honored.
Privacy Policy
